mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in real retail sales signals robust consumer spending, which drives corporate earnings expectations and lifts S&P 500 forward returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Rolling 12-month Spearman correlation between RSAFS 3-month change and SPX 20-day returns remains below 0.2 for 6 consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate above a low threshold signals the start of a monetary tightening cycle, which increases discount rates and depresses equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns in triggered periods are not significantly negative (one-sided t-test p > 0.10) or hit rate of negative returns is below 55% over any 3-year walk-forward.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneously rising unemployment and falling payrolls indicate a weakening labor market that erodes consumer income and confidence, producing sharp negative S&P 500 returns within a week.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE increases >0.3pp in 3 months and PAYEMS declines >100k over same period
failure_condition: The joint signal produces positive forward returns in more than 50% of triggered instances over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during confirmed economic expansion signals accelerating real activity, which boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth positive and INDPRO above its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Rank IC of INDPRO momentum conditional on positive GDP growth remains below 0.05 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts reflect positive construction activity and consumer confidence, which lead economic cycles and predict higher S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: HOUST 12-month change shows zero or negative correlation with subsequent 60-day returns over any 5-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating inflation above a critical threshold erodes real purchasing power and raises the risk of tighter monetary policy, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Negative forward returns occur in less than 60% of triggered instances over a 3-year walk-forward.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneously high unemployment and high inflation create a stagflationary environment with weak demand and persistent price pressures, severely depressing equity market returns within a week.
failure_condition: Average forward return when trigger is active is not at least 1% lower than unconditional mean over any 2-year period.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp acceleration in retail sales growth indicates strong consumer momentum that feeds into corporate earnings and lifts S&P 500 returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Hit rate of positive forward returns when trigger is active falls below 60% over any 3-year window.
